_note: This file is a design-time snapshot and may be out of date. For current step state, run: iw item-status <ID> --json. The DB is the authoritative source of truth (CR-00023).
title: Job detail "View document" link 404s with double project_id prefix

steps.description: Fix orch/jobs/aggregator.py: substitute the composite FK in raw['doc_id'] with the inner ProjectDoc.doc_id for doc_generation rows (list + detail), reusing the doc lookup already loaded for titles. Falls back to None when the doc is missing.
Review S01: correctness of inner-id mapping; orphan handling returns None; no extra DB queries; convention comment present; template contract preserved; no other consumers of raw['doc_id'] regressed.

Write tests/integration/test_i00064_doc_generation_view_document_url.py with three tests: reproduction (raw['doc_id'] equals inner doc_id, no ':'), end-to-end TestClient hitting /project/{pid}/docs/{raw.doc_id} → 200, orphan case returns None.
Review S03: tests assert specific values (semantic, not shape); reproduction is falsifiable on main; FastAPI TestClient set up uses dashboard fixture correctly; no flakiness or testcontainer leakage.

Global review across S01 + S03: fix and tests integrate end-to-end, the regression test really exercises the broken path, no other call sites of raw['doc_id'] regressed. Run full unit + integration suite.
Self-assessment of the just-completed item via the iw-item-analyze skill
QV: Browser verification — confirm the View document link resolves end-to-end in the isolated worktree stack
